# SOL-AI-009 — Route Registry + Page Creation Playbook

> **Resolves**: ISS-AI-009 (Routing System Phức Tạp 100+ Routes)  
> **Type**: Documentation + Tooling  
> **Priority**: Medium  
> **Effort**: Small (~1 week)  
> **Status**: Proposed

---

## 1. Mục Tiêu

Làm cho việc thêm route mới trở thành **quy trình 5-bước rõ ràng** không đòi hỏi AI phải hiểu toàn bộ routing system. Cung cấp route registry tự động và guard flowchart.

---

## 2. Giải Pháp

### 2.1 Route Registry — Autogenerated

Tạo script `scripts/generate-route-registry.ts` → output `src/router/.route-registry.json`:

```json
{
  "generated": "2026-05-13T10:00:00Z",
  "total": 102,
  "routes": [
    {
      "name": "workspace.settings.members",
      "path": "/setting/members",
      "component": "MembersPage",
      "file": "src/react/pages/settings/MembersPage.tsx",
      "routeFile": "src/router/dashboard/workspaceSetting.ts",
      "permissions": ["bb.users.list"],
      "framework": "react"
    },
    {
      "name": "project.database",
      "path": "/projects/:projectId/databases",
      "component": "ProjectDatabasesPage",
      "file": "src/react/pages/project/ProjectDatabasesPage.tsx",
      "routeFile": "src/router/dashboard/projectV1.ts",
      "permissions": ["bb.databases.list"],
      "framework": "react"
    }
  ]
}
```

Thêm vào `package.json`:
```json
{
  "scripts": {
    "generate:route-registry": "tsx scripts/generate-route-registry.ts",
    "predev": "pnpm generate:route-registry && pnpm generate:module-map"
  }
}
```

### 2.2 Page Creation Playbook

Tạo `.ai-context/NEW_PAGE_PLAYBOOK.md`:

```markdown
# Adding a New Page — 5-Step Playbook

## Step 1: Create the React Component File

```
Location: src/react/pages/{section}/YourPageName.tsx
Template:  Copy src/react/templates/new-page.tsx
Rule:      Named export MUST match filename (YourPageName.tsx → export function YourPageName)
```

```typescript
// src/react/pages/settings/YourNewPage.tsx
export function YourNewPage() {
  return <div>Your page content</div>;
}
```

## Step 2: Register Route in Router File

```
Settings pages:     src/router/dashboard/workspaceSetting.ts
Project pages:      src/router/dashboard/projectV1.ts
Workspace pages:    src/router/dashboard/workspace.ts
Instance pages:     src/router/dashboard/instance.ts
```

```typescript
// Add to appropriate router file:
{
  name: "workspace.settings.your-page",
  path: "your-path",
  component: () => import("@/react/ReactPageMount.vue"),
  props: { page: "YourNewPage" },  // ← Must match component name exactly
  meta: {
    requiredPermissionList: () => ["bb.your.permission"],
    title: (route) => t("your.page.title"),
  },
},
```

## Step 3: Add to Mount Glob (if new page section)

Only needed if your page is NOT in an already-globbed directory.
Check `src/react/mount.ts` — if your directory is already covered, SKIP this step.

Currently globbed directories:
- `./pages/settings/*.tsx` ← settings pages
- `./pages/project/*.tsx` ← project pages  
- `./pages/workspace/*.tsx` ← workspace pages
- `./pages/auth/*.tsx` ← auth pages
- `./components/*.tsx` ← shared components
- `./components/sql-editor/*.tsx` ← SQL editor components

## Step 4: Add Navigation Entry (if needed)

Sidebar items: `src/react/components/DashboardSidebar.tsx`
Project sidebar: `src/react/components/ProjectSidebar.tsx`
Settings sidebar: defined in route meta

## Step 5: Verify

```bash
pnpm dev
# Navigate to your new route
# Check browser console for errors
# Verify permissions work correctly
```

## Common Errors

| Error | Cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| Blank page | Component name doesn't match `props.page` | Check route `props.page` matches exported function name |
| 404 | Route not registered | Add route to correct router file |
| Permission error | Wrong `requiredPermissionList` | Check PermissionStore for correct permission strings |
| Component not found | File not in glob pattern | Check `src/react/mount.ts` glob patterns |
```

### 2.3 Navigation Guard Flowchart

Tạo `.ai-context/GUARD_FLOWCHART.md`:

```markdown
# Navigation Guard Decision Flow

```
User navigates to /target-route
  ↓
[1] Same path as current? → ABORT (infinite loop prevention)
  ↓ no
[2] Is /403 or /404? → ALLOW (error pages bypass)
  ↓ no
[3] Is /auth/callback? → ALLOW (OAuth bypass)
  ↓ no
[4] Is logged in AND going to /auth/* ? → REDIRECT to /
  ↓ no (or not logged in)
[5] Is NOT logged in? → REDIRECT to /auth/signin
  ↓ logged in
[6] 2FA required AND not set up? → REDIRECT to /auth/2fa-setup
  ↓ no
[7] Password reset required? → REDIRECT to /auth/reset-password
  ↓ no
[8] Route requires permission? → CHECK PermissionStore
  ↓ granted
ALLOW navigation
  ↓ denied
REDIRECT to /403
```

## Common Guard Debugging

**Symptom**: Redirecting to signin on every navigation
→ Check: authStore.isLoggedIn — may be stale

**Symptom**: Stuck in redirect loop
→ Check: Guard [1] — are from.fullPath === to.fullPath?

**Symptom**: 403 on valid route
→ Check: route.meta.requiredPermissionList — may have wrong permission string
→ Check: PermissionStore.hasPermission() for the user's actual roles
```

### 2.4 Long-term: React Router Migration

Khi Vue shell được thay thế (SOL-AI-001 Phase 3), routing trở nên đơn giản hơn nhiều:

```typescript
// Target state: React Router v7
// No more Vue Router + ReactPageMount.vue bridge
// No more 9-step navigation guard chain (replaced by React middleware)

// src/react/router/index.tsx
import { createBrowserRouter } from "react-router";

export const router = createBrowserRouter([
  {
    path: "/setting/members",
    element: <MembersPage />,
    loader: requirePermission("bb.users.list"),
  },
  // ... direct, flat, readable routes
]);
```

AI chỉ cần biết: thêm route vào `router/index.tsx` + permission check.

---

## 3. Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Viết `scripts/generate-route-registry.ts`
- [ ] Tạo `src/router/.route-registry.json` (gitignored, auto-generated)
- [ ] Tạo `.ai-context/NEW_PAGE_PLAYBOOK.md`
- [ ] Tạo `.ai-context/GUARD_FLOWCHART.md`
- [ ] Thêm `generate:route-registry` vào package.json + predev hook
- [ ] Update AGENTS.md: link đến NEW_PAGE_PLAYBOOK.md

---

## 4. Acceptance Criteria

| Metric | Current | Target |
|---|---|---|
| Steps to add new page | Unclear (implicit) | 5 explicit steps |
| Guard debugging time | High | Low (flowchart) |
| Route registration errors | Frequent | Rare |
| AI route knowledge accuracy | ~40% | > 90% (playbook) |
